faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What is the average timeline for a branding project?
faq.a1: A complete branding project (audit, positioning, visual identity, guidelines) typically takes 4 to 6 weeks. Projects including a website or social media strategy require 8 to 12 weeks depending on complexity.
faq.q2: Do you work with startups and small businesses?
faq.a2: Absolutely! We work with businesses of all sizes, from early-stage startups to established companies. Our packages are adapted to different budgets and we can phase projects according to your priorities.
faq.q3: What technologies do you use for web development?
faq.a3: We primarily use Next.js, React and TypeScript with Tailwind CSS for performant, accessible and maintainable websites. Depending on your needs, we also integrate headless CMS like Sanity or Contentful.
faq.q4: Do you offer maintenance after launch?
faq.a4: Yes, we offer monthly maintenance packages including security updates, content modifications, performance monitoring and technical support. The first month of support is included with every web project.
faq.q5: Can you manage our social media on an ongoing basis?
faq.a5: Yes, we offer ongoing management mandates that include content creation, editorial planning, community management and monthly reporting. Our packages adapt to your needs and budget.
faq.q6: How does the first meeting work?
faq.a6: The first meeting is a free 30-minute discovery call. We discuss your project, goals and timeline. Then we send you a detailed proposal with schedule and budget. No commitment required.

meta.title: About — Collectif Nova, Montreal
meta.description: Discover the story, values and team of Collectif Nova. A Montreal creative agency specializing in branding, web and motion design.

hero.title: About Collectif Nova
hero.subtitle: A collective of passionate creatives pushing the boundaries of design since 2020.

story.title: Our story
story.p1: Collectif Nova was born from a simple idea: bring complementary talents together under one roof to deliver integrated creative solutions. In 2020, Alex Moreau founded the collective with the conviction that the best creations come from collaboration between disciplines.
story.p2: Too often, brands have to juggle multiple agencies, losing coherence and efficiency along the way. At Collectif Nova, branding, web, social media and motion design work hand in hand to deliver unified and impactful experiences.
story.p3: Today, our team of creatives supports businesses of all sizes in Montreal and beyond, transforming their visions into digital realities that move things forward.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We push the boundaries of what's possible. Every project is an opportunity to explore new creative and technical approaches to stand out in a content-saturated world.

authenticity.title: Authenticity
authenticity.description: We create brands that ring true. No cookie-cutter formulas — every identity is a faithful reflection of each client's unique personality and ambitions.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: Beautiful isn't enough. Every creation is designed to generate concrete results: visibility, engagement, conversion. Aesthetics in service of performance.

team.title: Meet the team
team.subtitle: Complementary creatives, united by a passion for design and innovation.

alex.name: Alex Moreau
alex.bio: Founder of Collectif Nova, Alex has over 10 years of experience in art direction and branding. Passionate about visual identities that tell stories, he guides every project with a keen eye for detail and impact.

sam.name: Sam Chen
sam.bio: Expert in front-end development and interface design, Sam transforms creative concepts into high-performance web experiences. A Next.js and React specialist, he combines aesthetics and technology with precision.

jules.name: Jules Fontaine
jules.bio: Jules combines expertise in digital strategy and motion design to create attention-grabbing content. From editorial planning to striking animations, he brings brands to life across every screen.

members.name: Alex Moreau
members.title: Creative Director, Founder
members.bio: Founder of Collectif Nova, Alex has over 10 years of experience in art direction and branding. Passionate about visual identities that tell stories, he guides every project with a keen eye for detail and impact.

members.bio: Expert in front-end development and interface design, Sam transforms creative concepts into high-performance web experiences. A Next.js and React specialist, he combines aesthetics and technology with precision.

members.bio: Jules combines expertise in digital strategy and motion design to create attention-grabbing content. From editorial planning to striking animations, he brings brands to life across every screen.
